Container.Name: emby-watchparty
Container.Overview: A synchronized watch party application for Emby media servers. Watch videos together with friends in real-time, no matter where you are! All media streaming is proxied through the Flask app, keeping your Emby server safely on your internal network.
Container.Requires: A running Emby server reachable from this container, plus an Emby API key and the username/password of an Emby user with library access. Emby Premiere is required on the Emby side for hardware-accelerated transcoding (QSV, NVENC, VAAPI).

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the emby-watchparty web interface.

Config.Name: Emby Server URL
Config.Description: Full URL to your Emby server, e.g. http://192.168.1.100:8096

Config.Name: Emby API Key
Config.Description: Your Emby API key. Generate one in Emby Dashboard > Advanced > API Keys.

Config.Name: Emby Username
Config.Description: Emby username used to authenticate and proxy HLS streams.

Config.Name: Emby Password
Config.Description: Password for the Emby user above.

Config.Name: App Prefix
Config.Description: URL prefix for reverse proxy deployments (e.g. /watchparty). Leave empty for root deployment.

Config.Name: Require Login
Config.Description: Require Emby login to access the web UI (true/false). Leave false for open guest access.

Config.Name: Session Expiry (seconds)
Config.Description: Session expiry in seconds. Default 86400 (24 hours).

Config.Name: Static Session Enabled
Config.Description: Keep a single persistent party alive across restarts (true/false). Users navigating to / are redirected straight into the party.

Config.Name: Static Session ID
Config.Description: Fixed party ID used when Static Session Enabled is true. Uppercase.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.

Config.Name: Console Log Level
Config.Description: Log level for stdout/console output. Default WARNING keeps Docker logs quiet.

Config.Name: Log To File
Config.Description: Set to false (recommended for Docker) to output logs to stdout only. Set to true to write logs to a file inside the container.

Config.Name: Log File Path
Config.Description: Path to the log file inside the container. Only used when Log To File is true.

Config.Name: Log Max Size (MB)
Config.Description: Maximum size of the log file in megabytes before rotation.

Config.Name: Max Users Per Party
Config.Description: Maximum users per watch party. 0 means unlimited.

Config.Name: Enable HLS Token Validation
Config.Description: Validate HLS stream tokens so only party members can fetch segments (true/false).

Config.Name: HLS Token Expiry (seconds)
Config.Description: How long HLS tokens remain valid, in seconds. Default 86400 (24 hours).

Config.Name: Enable Rate Limiting
Config.Description: Enable per-IP rate limiting on API endpoints (true/false).

Config.Name: Rate Limit: Party Creations Per Hour
Config.Description: Maximum party creations per IP per hour.

Config.Name: Rate Limit: API Calls Per Minute
Config.Description: Maximum API calls per IP per minute.

Config.Name: ENV File Path (optional)
Config.Description: Optional: mount a .env file into the container. If set, values in this file will be used. Individual env vars above take precedence.

Config.Name: App Config Directory
Config.Description: Path on the host where emby-watchparty will store any persistent config or state.
